race.comment: Low quality race and sticking with WHATSANAMEGEORGE (2) who put the writing on the wall down at Bordertown last time when runner-up. This looks ideal and a repeat would see him go close. KAILEE'S BOY (3) came through the same race and was well off best, pushing forward early but fading right out. Off a wide draw here but will take up the running and give a sight on best form. Does boast a strong record this course and distance. OVERLOADED (1) was having first run for the new yard and led until the final few bounds of the Port Augusta Cup last time in a brave run. Can give a sight again. CELTIC MALEY (4) is a former Waller galloper who was off a let-up then has had two runs for the new yard. Gets out in trip now and gets chance to show best. SHADOW HAWK (10) rates highly on best form and can bounce back.
